response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches 'Genesis' by hololive English -Advent- and 'TEMARI' by Ninomae Ina'nis. Reference JSON was partially helpful for 'Genesis' metadata but lacked lyrics for both songs; used on-screen text and identified audio to provide accurate transcriptions. Only subtitled active vocal segments, discarding instrumental breaks and the interlude. Timing is strictly aligned with vocal onset and offset, with English translation provided for 'TEMARI'.

subtitles.original: さぁ 散らばってしまった話を
subtitles.english: Come, of the stories that have scattered...

subtitles.original: 空に手を伸ばし始める
subtitles.english: I begin to reach my hand out to the sky.

subtitles.original: 知った 踊りすぎる禍々しさに
subtitles.english: I learned, of the ominousness that dances too much,

subtitles.original: 縛られた足をくすぐるの
subtitles.english: it tickles my bound feet.

subtitles.original: 嗚呼 堕ちて汚れた意識を
subtitles.english: Ah, take my fallen, soiled consciousness...

subtitles.original: 名前と綴りにかけて
subtitles.english: and stake it on my name and its spelling.

subtitles.original: 躰 戻ってだた身体の
subtitles.english: Body, returned as just a body...

subtitles.original: 夢見ていた目蓋が開く
subtitles.english: the eyelids that were dreaming open up.

subtitles.original: 心の奥から蠢く記憶が
subtitles.english: Memory wriggling from the depths of the heart...
